prompt: I've been looking into `Drizzle ORM` vs `Prisma`. Here's what I found: Drizzle is faster and has better TypeScript support, while Prisma has a nicer CLI. We should go with Drizzle. Please document this research.
assertions: A markdown file was created inside a 'research' subdirectory (not just in the outputs root)
The filename includes a UTC timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD_HHMMSSZ format
The document has a recommendation section explicitly recommending Drizzle
The document mentions Drizzle's performance/speed advantage
The document mentions Drizzle's better TypeScript support
The document mentions Prisma's nicer CLI as an advantage of Prisma
The document has a findings or comparison section (not just a conclusion)
